message:
fix(rwlock): extend pre-grant drop safety to OwnedWriteFuture with cascading wakeup

Apply the same cancellation-safe drop pattern from WriteFuture to
OwnedWriteFuture:

OwnedWriteFuture::poll:
- Flatten else branch for dequeued pre-grant path (style consistency)

OwnedWriteFuture::drop:
- If waiter_id found in queue: remove it, decrement writer_waiters
- If waiter_id dequeued (pre-granted but dropped before acquiring):
  decrement writer_waiters, clear writer_active, then cascade:
  - If more writers waiting: pop next, set writer_active
  - Otherwise: drain reader waiters, pre-increment state.readers
- If waiter_id.is_none() (never registered): decrement counter,
  cascade to readers if no more writers waiting
- Move reader draining inside the conditional branches instead of
  unconditional post-check, matching the non-Owned WriteFuture

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
